---
title: Data Management
---

In this section you will find information regarding the following topics:

-   Data Archive Methods
    -   [Google Cloud ](https://sael-swfsc.github.io/SAEL-lab-manual/content/Data-Archive.html)
    
-   Species reference guide for the Pacific Northwest
    -   [SAEL Example](https://sael-swfsc.github.io/SAEL-lab-manual/content/Data-SpeciesAndCallTypes.html)
    
-   Media
    -   [SAEL Example](https://sael-swfsc.github.io/SAEL-lab-manual/content/media.html)
